_description: AC-2 / AC-6 parity fixture: an early-session VWAP breakdown whose confirming ticks ALL fall inside the open-window grace period (grace_minutes = 15, breakdown confirms within ticks 0-5). Production suppresses both VWAP signals in the grace window, so it produces NO exit. The pre-fix replay has no grace gate and fires a phantom VWAP Breakdown. Each tick: return below the HWM but with safe_hwm >= VWAP_CROSS_HWM_PCT so System A (profit-protection break) arms; negative vwap_diff with full weight so the VWAP gate passes. MC held neutral (50) so the trailing stop / TP do not interfere.
_provenance: Hand-derived input sequence. Schema = synthetic_history tick dict. The parity test asserts the production harness (with grace) and the corrected replay (with grace) both produce NO early-session exit; a companion test runs the same ticks with grace_minutes=0 and asserts the VWAP exit then DOES fire (the gate is a time-bounded suppression, not a disable).
